$comment: the-last-aibender account profile manifest (SI-2). Label + machine-local path CONVENTION only — never a real identity [X2]. Expansion + derivation rules: infra/profiles/README.md.
label: ENT
featureDetection: ENT capabilities are feature-detected at runtime — managed policy may restrict headless use, telemetry, workflows, or models; the UI degrades per account (blueprint §3 rule 6). Nothing in this manifest may assume parity with the Max accounts.
